class.name: CSVDialect
class.description: CSVDialect stores delimiter, header, casting, and parser option settings for common CSV variants. It can be created from built-in profiles, dictionaries, or inferred from a sample string.

method.name: from_dictionary
method.description: Creates a dialect from a dictionary produced by [method to_dictionary].

method.name: from_profile
method.description: Creates a built-in dialect profile. Supported names include [code]csv[/code], [code]rfc4180[/code], [code]tsv[/code], [code]excel[/code], and [code]pipes[/code].

method.name: to_dictionary
method.description: Serializes this dialect to a dictionary.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], imported values are converted to typed values.
The delimiter used to split fields.
If [code]true[/code], the first row is treated as headers.
Parser options used by this dialect.
